nasb.text: Therefore we have sent Judas and Silas, who themselves will also report the same things by word of mouth.

esv.text: We have therefore sent Judas and Silas, who themselves will tell you the same things by word of mouth.

cnv.text: 我們派了猶大和西拉一同去，他們也會親口述說這些事。

ccb.text: 我们选派犹大和西拉两位代表跟他们一起去，向你们报告我们的决定。

csbs.text: 所以我们派了犹大和赛拉斯去，他们会亲口报告同样的事，
